title: Jonaykon's Building Modpack 1
description: Adds things for building cities, houses etc. Like AI Cars, Automated Trains, Boats and Airplanes. Elevators, Furniture, other new building blocks and more!
body:
## Description

Adds things for building cities, houses etc. Like AI Cars, Automated Trains, Boats and Airplanes. Elevators, Furniture, other new building blocks and more!

## Notes

To access the cars, for the moment you will need to run the command "/function ctg115_gshn28:eggs"
For better visuals you can download [Physics Mod Pro](https://minecraftphysicsmod.com/pro) (Configuration file is included with the modpack) and [SEUS Renewed](https://sonicether.com/shaders/download/renewed-v1-0-1/#close)

## Content that need to be downloaded seperately

### This only applies to the newest version, if you want an older version check the list in the changelog instead.

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/landk-furniture

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/landk-door-and-window

## Tutorials for some more complicated mods

[Minecraft Transit Railway / MTR, (Trains, Boats, Cable cars, Airplanes, Elevators, Escelators)](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLp0jZgheSlXv_vjilwnbrOtdbmgvz1VkC)

[Cars](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d8feAj6DU3c)

[Chisels & Bits]()

## Mods from CurseForge

[TrafficCraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trafficcraft)

[Sweet Concrete](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sweet-concrete)

[Shutup Experimental Settings!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shutup-experimental-settings)

[Macaw's Fences and Walls](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-fences-and-walls)

[Macaw's Roofs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-roofs)

[Macaw's Bridges](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges)

[Double Slabs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/double-slabs)

[Chisels & Bits](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chisels-bits)

## Credits

The textures for Planks are from [Faithful](https://faithfulpack.net/)
